productDisplayName: Basics Men Solid White Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionWhite shirt made of 100% cotton, has panel stitches with flat seams and minimal thread detailing, a tipped collar with buttons and a full front buttoned placket, full sleeves with mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, haul loop on the back and has a curved hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroideryStylsih to the hilt is what this panel stitch shirt from basics is all about. The full sleeves are sure to keep the chill away this winter, while you can roll them up and secure them with the mid-sleeve buttoned flaps to suit the occasion. The haul loop on the back allows you to hang it dry with ease. Team this shirt with jeans and suede shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
